overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character in a grey suit walking along a high-rise rooftop terrace with futuristic glass architecture. The character traverses grassy and concrete outdoor areas with seating, overlooks a sprawling futuristic cityscape with a green river, and enters a modern glass building.

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to white concrete terrace

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy edge of the high-rise terrace overlooking the futuristic cityscape below

sprawling futuristic city with white buildings and distant mountains
dark vines hanging from the overhang above

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy rooftop terrace edge with a glass railing, overlooking a vast futuristic cityscape with distant mountains and a prominent white tower. Dark vines hang from the overhang above, and an orange building wall runs along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor terrace with seating area

events.description: passing by seated NPCs at outdoor tables under the covered terrace

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete terrace past outdoor seating areas with NPCs sitting at tables

NPC sitting at a table overlooking the city view

large transparent glass walls of the building with metal frames
round tables with chairs arranged on the terrace
circular tables with red tops and metal frames
modern metal chairs with red seats
rectangular planters with green shrubs and flowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a white concrete terrace under a covered overhang, passing by outdoor seating with red tables and metal chairs. NPCs sit at tables on the left and right, and large planters with greenery line the right side. The glass building facade runs along the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace corner overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: character stops at the terrace corner to look out at the cityscape and distant tower
character turns around and begins walking back toward the building entrance

agents.ego_description: stopping at the terrace corner to observe the cityscape and green river below, then turning to walk back

entered.detail: corner of the terrace with glass railing overlooking the city
greenish river or lake visible far below in the city
distinctive tall tower with circular structure near the base

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the corner of the terrace overlooking a green river far below and a distinctive tall tower in the distance. After pausing to observe the view, the character turns and walks back along the terrace, passing large planters now on the left side.

events.description: entering the building interior through large automatic glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking toward the glass building entrance and entering the interior lobby area

notable_agents.action: NPC in a green jacket walking out of the building as the character enters

entered.detail: large entrance opening with glass walls
transparent automatic glass doors
modern interior space with high ceilings and contemporary design
spherical pendant lights hanging from the ceiling
red-leafed plants in white pots flanking the entrance
light-colored marble tile flooring inside the building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the glass building entrance, passes through the automatic glass doors, and enters the modern interior lobby with marble floors and hanging lights. An NPC exits the building as the character enters the indoor space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a high-rise rooftop terrace that transitions from an open-air overlook into a sleek interior lobby. It begins with the character walking along a grassy edge beside a glass railing, overlooking a vast futuristic cityscape with distant mountains and a prominent white tower. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a white concrete terrace under a covered overhang, passing by outdoor seating with red tables and NPCs before reaching a corner that reveals a green river far below. The camera then follows the character as they turn back along the terrace, passing large greenery-filled planters before approaching the glass building entrance. Finally, the character passes through automatic glass doors and enters a modern interior lobby featuring marble floors and hanging lights.
